rule_metadata.name: SUSP_ELF_SPARC_Hunting_SBZ_Obfuscation
rule_metadata.description: This rule is UNTESTED against a large dataset and is for hunting purposes only.
rule_metadata.author: netadr, modified by Florian Roth to avoid elf module import

rules.rule_text:
rule SUSP_ELF_SPARC_Hunting_SBZ_Obfuscation
{
	meta:
		description = "This rule is UNTESTED against a large dataset and is for hunting purposes only."
		author = "netadr, modified by Florian Roth to avoid elf module import"
		reference = "https://netadr.github.io/blog/a-quick-glimpse-sbz/"
		date = "2023-04-02"
		modified = "2023-05-08"
		score = 60
		id = "15ee9a66-d823-508c-a14c-2c6ff45f47e5"

	strings:
		$xor_block = { 9A 18 E0 47 9A 1B 40 01 9A 18 80 0D }
		$a1 = "SUNW_"

	condition:
		uint32be( 0 ) == 0x7f454c46 and $a1 and $xor_block
}

rule_metadata.name: SUSP_ELF_SPARC_Hunting_SBZ_UniqueStrings
rule_metadata.description: This rule is UNTESTED against a large dataset and is for hunting purposes only.
rule_metadata.author: netadr, modified by Florian Roth for performance reasons

rules.rule_text:
rule SUSP_ELF_SPARC_Hunting_SBZ_UniqueStrings
{
	meta:
		description = "This rule is UNTESTED against a large dataset and is for hunting purposes only."
		author = "netadr, modified by Florian Roth for performance reasons"
		reference = "https://netadr.github.io/blog/a-quick-glimpse-sbz/"
		date = "2023-04-02"
		modified = "2023-05-08"
		score = 60
		id = "d2f70d10-412e-5e83-ba4f-eac251012dc1"

	strings:
		$s1 = "<%u>[%s] Event #%u: "
		$s2 = "lprc:%08X" ascii fullword
		$s3 = "diuXxobB"
		$s4 = "CHM_FW"

	condition:
		2 of ( $* )
}

rule_metadata.name: SUSP_ELF_SPARC_Hunting_SBZ_ModuleStruct
rule_metadata.description: This rule is UNTESTED against a large dataset and is for hunting purposes only.
rule_metadata.author: netadr, modified by Florian Roth for FP reduction reasons

rules.rule_text:
rule SUSP_ELF_SPARC_Hunting_SBZ_ModuleStruct
{
	meta:
		description = "This rule is UNTESTED against a large dataset and is for hunting purposes only."
		author = "netadr, modified by Florian Roth for FP reduction reasons"
		reference = "https://netadr.github.io/blog/a-quick-glimpse-sbz/"
		date = "2023-04-02"
		modified = "2023-05-08"
		score = 60
		id = "909746f1-44f5-597b-bdb2-2a1396d4b8c7"

	strings:
		$be = { 02 02 00 00 01 C1 00 07 }
		$le = { 02 02 00 00 07 00 C1 01 }

	condition:
		uint32be( 0 ) == 0x7f454c46 and ( $be or $le )
}
